name: esp_ota_service_get_version
description: Get the current and latest checked firmware version, and whether upgrade is available

name: esp_ota_service_get_progress
description: Get OTA state and progress: bytes written, total bytes (-1 if unknown), percent (0-100, -1 if unknown)

name: esp_ota_service_check_update
description: Trigger OTA check_update and return whether update is available with incoming version metadata
